tools.name: list_destinations
tools.description: List destinations (countries) Simsima covers, with min price and product URL.

tools.name: search_plans
tools.description: Search plans for a destination (country name or slug), with optional filters.

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Get a single plan by its sku.

tools.name: recommend_plan
tools.description: Recommend the best plan(s) for a trip given its length and data usage.

tools.name: create_checkout_link
tools.description: Return a Simsima product URL with agent attribution, for the user to complete checkout.
